messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to share a quick update on the backend migration initiative. We are currently 80% complete and remain on track for delivery this Friday as planned.

Please let me know if you need any further details.

Best regards

content.delta: Done! Your email has been sent to **alice@example.com** with the subject **"Project Update"** confirming the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
